case_title: IAN CURRAN et al VS. ANDREW LOEV

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-03-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-03-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT.
